title: Investigation: True & Fair Party (GB) (de-registered political party)
text:
Subject: True & Fair Party (GB) (de-registered political party)

Investigated for: Failure to return an impermissible donation of £50,000 within 30 days of receipt

Decision: One offence found but no sanction imposed

Summary of reasons: The £50,000 impermissible donation was voluntarily returned by the party, although after the 30-day deadline, and the party has since de-registered with the Commission. We decided not to impose a sanction, as it was neither proportionate nor in the public interest to do so in the circumstances of the case.
